name: Sonic Healthcare Limited
analysis: SHL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 27% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$20.4200, stop A$19.1219, target A$22.7486 (1.79:1) — then trail it.
